name: POST /api/leads/:id/notes - Append an operator note to the lead timeline
description: Operator-authored notes are stored as 'lead.note' rows in lead_timeline_events alongside system events (so the timeline read renders them inline). Body is plain text (max 5000 chars); empty / whitespace-only payloads 400.
skipReason: lead-service runs on port 4011 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

payload.body: {{static:Spoke with the lead — wants to schedule a site visit next weekend.}}
